raw_text:
52. Tooling Project Manager

Job Summary  
Leads tooling -related projects from concept to completion, ensuring delivery within sco pe, 
time, and budget.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Plan and manage tooling projects  
• Define project scope, timelines, and budgets  
• Coordinate cross -functional teams (design, production, quality)  
• Track project progress and resolve issues  
• Ensure timely tool development and delivery  
• Communicate with stakeholders and clients  
Required Skills  
• Project management and planning  
• Tooling and manufacturing knowledge  
• Leadership and communication  
• Risk management and problem -solving  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production (MBA preferred)  
Experience  
• 6–12 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹60,000 – ₹1,50,000 per month
